title: Text Processing
description: Perintah untuk memproses dan memanipulasi teks di macOS.

commands.name: grep
commands.title: Grep
commands.examples:
grep -rn 'func' *.swift
grep -E 'error|warning' log.txt
grep -i 'hello' file.txt
grep -w 'main' *.c
commands.notes: macOS menggunakan BSD grep. Install GNU grep via `brew install grep` (as ggrep).

commands.name: sed
commands.title: Stream Editor
commands.description: Editor teks berbasis stream untuk substitusi dan transformasi.
commands.examples:
sed 's/old/new/g' file.txt
sed -i '' 's/foo/bar/g' file.txt
sed -n '10,20p' file.txt
sed '/^#/d' config.conf
commands.warning: Di macOS, `sed -i` HARUS diikuti '' (string kosong). Beda dengan Linux yang cukup `sed -i`.

commands.name: awk
commands.title: AWK
commands.description: Bahasa pemrograman untuk pemrosesan teks berbasis kolom.
commands.examples:
awk '{print $1}' file.txt
awk -F: '{print $1, $3}' /etc/passwd
awk '$3 > 100 {print $1, $3}' data.txt
awk 'NR==5,NR==10' file.txt

commands.name: sort
commands.title: Sort
commands.examples:
sort names.txt
sort -nr numbers.txt
sort -t',' -k2 data.csv
sort -u wordlist.txt

commands.name: cut
commands.title: Cut
commands.examples:
cut -d',' -f1,3 data.csv
cut -c1-10 file.txt
echo $PATH | tr ':' '\n' | cut -d'/' -f1-3

commands.name: tr
commands.title: Translate
commands.examples:
echo 'hello' | tr 'a-z' 'A-Z'
cat file.txt | tr -d '\r'
echo 'aabbcc' | tr -s 'a-z'

commands.name: pbcopy-pbpaste
commands.title: Clipboard (macOS)
commands.description: Copy/paste dari/ke clipboard macOS via terminal.
commands.examples:
echo 'Hello' | pbcopy
pbpaste
cat file.txt | pbcopy
pbpaste > output.txt
commands.notes: Fitur khas macOS. Di Linux gunakan xclip atau xsel.
